ddls:
CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the software dependency */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dependency */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the dependency (e.g., x86_64) */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the dependency in MB */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Short summary of the dependency's functionality */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependency provider */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the dependency is deprecated */,
  "is_vulnerable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the dependency has known vulnerabilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES dependency_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the software project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_dependencies" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project utilizing the dependency */,
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependency being used */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., direct, transitive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "dependency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependency_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependency */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the dependency */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when this version was released */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Change log detailing updates in this version */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., major, minor, patch) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of changes in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependency_versions_dependency_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_id") REFERENCES dependencies ("dependency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependency_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for subcategories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependency_licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license entry */,
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependency to which the license applies */,
  "license_name" TEXT /* Name of the license */,
  "license_url" TEXT /* URL for the license details */,
  "license_compatibility" TEXT /* Compatibility information for the license */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependency_licenses_dependency_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_id") REFERENCES dependencies ("dependency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user in the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with this role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was performed */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the log entry (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "additional_data" TEXT /* Optional additional information about the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependency_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the provider */,
  "provider_url" TEXT /* URL for the provider's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependency_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependency being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependency_reviews_dependency_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_id") REFERENCES dependencies ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependency_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ci_cd_pipelines" (
  "pipeline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pipeline */,
  "pipeline_name" TEXT /* Name of the pipeline */,
  "pipeline_url" TEXT /* URL for the pipeline's configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pipeline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pipeline_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pipeline run */,
  "pipeline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pipeline that was run */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the pipeline was run */,
  "run_status" TEXT /* Status of the pipeline run (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pipeline_runs_pipeline_id FOREIGN KEY ("pipeline_id") REFERENCES ci_cd_pipelines ("pipeline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependency_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance entry */,
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependency being tracked */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Compliance status of the dependency (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependency_compliance_dependency_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_id") REFERENCES dependencies ("dependency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependency_vulnerabilities" (
  "vulnerability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vulnerability */,
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependency with the vulnerability */,
  "vulnerability_description" TEXT /* Description of the vulnerability */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the vulnerability (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date when the vulnerability was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vulnerability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependency_audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependency being audited */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date when the audit was conducted */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the audit (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "auditor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the audit */,
  "non_compliance_reason" TEXT /* Reason for non-compliance (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependency_audits_dependency_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_id") REFERENCES dependencies ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependency_audits_auditor_id FOREIGN KEY ("auditor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependency_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependency related to the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was issued */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message detailing the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., update, vulnerability, deprecation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependency_notifications_dependency_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_id") REFERENCES dependencies ("dependency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependency_documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each documentation entry */,
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependency related to the documentation */,
  "doc_url" TEXT /* URL for the documentation */,
  "doc_summary" TEXT /* Summary of what the documentation covers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependency_documentation_dependency_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_id") REFERENCES dependencies ("dependency_id")
)
